title: PortSwigger Web Security Academy
notes: Comprehensive web app security labs. Covers OWASP Top 10 hands-on.

title: OWASP Top 10 (2021)
notes: Essential reading. Know every category cold for interviews.

title: OWASP Web Security Testing Guide
notes: Detailed methodology for web app security assessments.

title: HackTheBox — Free Starter Labs
notes: Free tier includes retired machines and starting point labs.

title: DVWA — Damn Vulnerable Web Application
notes: Self-hosted vulnerable app for practice. You already use this.

title: OWASP Juice Shop
notes: Modern vulnerable web app with guided challenges.

title: OWASP LLM Top 10
notes: The standard reference for LLM security risks. You already know this — keep it as interview prep.

title: Gandalf — Lakera AI Prompt Injection Challenge
notes: Hands-on prompt injection levels. Great for understanding LLM manipulation.

title: Garak — LLM Vulnerability Scanner
notes: Open-source LLM red-teaming tool by NVIDIA. Hands-on experience with automated LLM testing.

title: Microsoft Learn — AI Security Fundamentals
notes: Microsoft's free AI security learning path. Good for foundational concepts.

title: Hugging Face — NLP / LLM Course
notes: Understand LLMs at a technical level. Helps contextualize security risks.

title: Promptfoo — LLM Red Teaming Framework
notes: Open-source tool for testing LLM applications. Eval-driven red teaming.

title: Damn Vulnerable LLM Agent
notes: Vulnerable LLM agent application for hands-on practice.

title: Rebuff — Prompt Injection Detection
notes: Self-hosted prompt injection detection framework.

title: TryHackMe — SOC Level 1 Path (Free Rooms)
notes: Structured SOC analyst training. Many rooms free without subscription.

title: Blue Team Labs Online — Free Tier
notes: Blue team investigation challenges. Free community tier available.

title: Let's Defend — Community Edition
notes: SOC analyst simulator with free community access. Alert triage practice.

title: Splunk Fundamentals 1
notes: Free introductory Splunk course. Essential SIEM skill for SOC roles.

title: Elastic Security Fundamentals (Free)
notes: Free ELK stack security training. Covers SIEM use cases.

title: Antisyphon Training — Pay-What-You-Can Courses
notes: John Strand's courses. SOC Core Skills, Active Defense. Pay-what-you-can model.

title: CompTIA Security+ Exam Objectives PDF
notes: Free objectives PDF as a SOC knowledge roadmap. Study guide for the cert.

title: Google IT Support Professional Certificate (Coursera audit)
notes: Free to audit. Covers networking, security, troubleshooting fundamentals.

title: ITIL 4 Foundation Overview (Free Resources)
notes: ITIL overview and free prep materials. Useful for service desk → security transition.

title: Microsoft SC-900 — Security Fundamentals (Free Learning Path)
notes: Free Microsoft Learn path. Bridges service desk knowledge to security concepts.
